description: Weekly real cost for the selected AWS scope (dropdown; default All = whole fbossci account) from CloudWatch EstimatedCharges, meta-fleet CI hours for the pytorch and meta-pytorch orgs, and that scope's cost per CI-hour. Select a specific service to filter to it.

spec.description: Real spend for the selected AWS scope (dropdown; default All = whole fbossci account) from CloudWatch EstimatedCharges (AWS/Billing). 'All' is the true whole-account total (EstimatedCharges with no ServiceName dimension, Currency only); selecting a specific service filters to that service (adds the ServiceName dimension). Cash-basis / unblended list price — NOT net-amortized (does not spread RI/Savings Plan amortization or apply credits). EstimatedCharges is cumulative month-to-date and resets to 0 at each month boundary; daily spend is reset-handled via IF(DIFF(m1) < 0, m1, DIFF(m1)). Daily values are bucketed to ISO weeks (Monday-start, UTC).
spec.title: Total AWS Cost — fbossci (weekly) [service]

spec.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(started_at) AS Time, sum(dateDiff('second', started_at, completed_at))/3600 AS ci_hours FROM default.workflow_job WHERE (startsWith(repository_full_name, 'pytorch/') OR startsWith(repository_full_name, 'meta-pytorch/')) AND status = 'completed' AND completed_at > started_at AND started_at >= $__fromTime AND started_at <= $__toTime AND arrayExists(x -> startsWith(x, 'mt-') OR startsWith(x, 'linux.') OR startsWith(x, 'windows.'), labels) GROUP BY Time ORDER BY Time

spec.description: Weekly CI hours for the pytorch and meta-pytorch orgs (repository_full_name starting with pytorch/ or meta-pytorch/) on the meta fleet (runner labels prefixed mt-, linux., or windows.; excludes lf- / lf. LF runners and GitHub-hosted). Sum of completed-job durations (dateDiff started_at -> completed_at). Daily values are bucketed to ISO weeks (Monday-start, UTC).
spec.title: Total CI Hours — pytorch + meta-pytorch meta fleet (weekly)

spec.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfDay(started_at) AS Time, sum(dateDiff('second', started_at, completed_at))/3600 AS ci_hours FROM default.workflow_job WHERE (startsWith(repository_full_name, 'pytorch/') OR startsWith(repository_full_name, 'meta-pytorch/')) AND status = 'completed' AND completed_at > started_at AND started_at >= $__fromTime AND started_at <= $__toTime AND arrayExists(x -> startsWith(x, 'mt-') OR startsWith(x, 'linux.') OR startsWith(x, 'windows.'), labels) GROUP BY Time ORDER BY Time

spec.description: Weekly real cost for the selected AWS scope (dropdown; default All = whole fbossci account) from CloudWatch EstimatedCharges (reset-handled) divided by meta-fleet CI hours for the pytorch and meta-pytorch orgs. 'All' uses the true whole-account total (no ServiceName dimension); selecting a specific service filters the numerator to that service. CloudWatch daily cost and ClickHouse daily CI-hours are outer-joined on the shared midnight-UTC day, bucketed to ISO weeks, then divided per week. The numerator is fbossci spend (cash-basis / unblended, NOT net-amortized) for the selected scope, amortized over meta-fleet CI-hours — not a full per-runner unit cost.
spec.title: AWS Cost per CI-Hour (weekly) [service]

title: Cost per CI-Hour
